Title: Monitoring is vulnerable to Archive Slip due to missing checks in sanitization
Description: The `sanitizeArchivePath` function in `pkg/extract/extract.go` (lines 248–254) is vulnerable to a path traversal bypass due to a missing trailing path separator in the `strings.HasPrefix` check. A crafted tar archive can write files outside the intended destination directory when using the `extractor` CLI tool or the `extract.DumpOTelCollector` library function.
